/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/service/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/service/main_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/service/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/FlatCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/LoginCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/HouseCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/RegisterCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/QuitCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/patterns/GetFlatsCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/repository/FlatRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/repository/HouseRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/repository/UserRepository.cpp.o -o server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -lpqxx
